exercises.code:
casos = [
    "normalize.py importa compare en el mismo paquete",
    "plugin externo usa familiarity_core",
    "ejecutar el CLI del paquete",
]
recs = [
    "relativo (from . import compare) OK",
    "absoluto (import familiarity_core...)",
    "python -m familiarity_core",
]
for c, r in zip(casos, recs):
    print(f"{c} -> {r}")

print("BREAKING: compare(a,b)->bool se vuelve compare(a,b)->float score")
print("NEW_VERSION: 1.0.0 (major)")

paths = [
    "src/familiarity_core/__init__.py",
    "src/familiarity_core/normalize.py",
    "src/familiarity_core/cli.py",
    "pyproject.toml",
]
for p in paths:
    print(p)

print("cause: nombre del paquete no coincide con import")
print("cause: no se instaló editable (pip install -e .)")
print("cause: cwd / PYTHONPATH no encuentra src")

cambios = [
    "renombrar normalize a clean_name (API pública)",
    "añadir flag --format a report",
    "corregir typo en help",
    "eliminar subcomando compare",
]
niveles = ["major", "minor", "patch", "major"]
for c, n in zip(cambios, niveles):
    print(f"{c}: {n}")

dependencies = []
print("dependencies", dependencies)
print("requires-python>=3.11")
print("note: N1 stdlib-only deps vacías")

print("POLICY: no renombrar entidades públicas sin major")
print("POLICY: documentar versiones en CHANGELOG antes de S11 dominio")
print("POLICY: añadir campos opcionales en minor; quitar required es major")

import argparse
p = argparse.ArgumentParser()
sub = p.add_subparsers(dest="cmd", required=True)
r = sub.add_parser("report")
r.add_argument("--format", choices=["text", "json"], default="text")
ns = p.parse_args(["report", "--format", "json"])
print(ns)

casos = [
    "normalize ok",
    "archivo de input no existe",
    "flag desconocido",
    "subcomando ausente",
    "validación de config falla al arrancar",
]
codes = [0, 1, 2, 2, 1]
for c, code in zip(casos, codes):
    print(f"{c}: {code}")

print("HELP: familiarity normalize TEXTO — limpia y normaliza un texto sintético")
print("HELP: familiarity report --format text|json — imprime un resumen del lote")
print("HELP: usa -h en cada subcomando para ver flags; datos solo en pantalla, logs al costado")

from io import StringIO
import sys

def process(n):
    return n * 2

out = StringIO()
err = StringIO()
old_out, old_err = sys.stdout, sys.stderr
sys.stdout, sys.stderr = out, err
print(process(3))
print("event=done", file=sys.stderr)
sys.stdout, sys.stderr = old_out, old_err
print("stdout", out.getvalue().strip())
print("stderr", err.getvalue().strip())

def bad_cli():
    print("empezando")
    print('{"ok": true}')
    print("fin")

def good_cli():
    print('{"ok": true}')  # solo datos en stdout

print("BAD")
bad_cli()
print("GOOD")
good_cli()

print("1:defaults")
print("2:file")
print("3:env")
print("4:flags")

print("result=INFO")
print("razón: flags gana a env (precedencia flags > env > file > defaults)")

for e in [".env", "*.pem", "credentials.json", ".venv/"]:
    print(f"ignore: {e}")

inseguro = {"log_level": "DEBUG", "echo_sql": True, "api_token": "hardcoded"}
print("log_level: DEBUG → INFO")
print("echo_sql: True → False")
print("api_token: hardcoded → (ausente; solo env/secrets)")

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Theory: if __name__ == '__main__' solo corre CLI/demo al ejecutar, no al importar.
Theory: logs de progreso a stderr; stdout = datos.
Theory: secretos (.env con token) no van al git.
